Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So, uh, the big meet for that scholarship was yesterday.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}Why so surprised? What, you don't believe me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Guess this means it's really over. Running track, I mean.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Not to sound dramatic, but I wanna do it to protect my family.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}{f 5 13 18 5 115}Like I said, I don't have any regrets. Plus, there's something I need to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Not to sound dramatic, but I wanna do it to protect my family.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}So I'm thinking I'll get a job. We'll need it to survive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I know where, too. My dad had connections at a car factory, so I'll apply there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Go ahead and order extra noodles. It's on me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I knew you'd make a thing out of it. Seriously, don't sweat it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You helped me figure a bunch of things out, y'know.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I always blamed school or my family for everything. I was using it as an escape from my own responsibilities...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I really lucked out by meeting you. If I hadn't, I'd still be stuck in that same hole.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase opened up to[n]me about his decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're getting closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Well, I better start packing. Got a lot of goodbyes to get through and not enough time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}We should grab a bite again after school soon. Who knows how many chances we'll get after this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hayase and I chatted until it got late.[n]{f 1 1}
